# Privacy Profile — Test Fixture (clean-profile)

This fixture declares a valid regime. The validator should exit 0 in
`--scan-file` mode against this file.

## Declared regime

regime: GDPR — this project processes personal data of EU data subjects and
is subject to the General Data Protection Regulation.

## Data handling principles

1. Data minimisation — collect only what is required.
2. Purpose limitation — process only for declared purposes.
3. Storage limitation — retain only for as long as needed.
4. Security — appropriate technical and organisational measures in place.
